_instructions: Translate each text into: sr (Serbian Latin with čćžšđ), sr_cyrl (Serbian Cyrillic), en (English), ru (Russian), de (German), tr (Turkish). Return same structure with translations filled in.

reviews.text:
I flew from the Netherlands to Podgorica, to have new crowns fitted in my mouth.
I was handled very professionally by the first contact person Stefan and after that Andrej and Dr Filip did the professional and online consultations with me.
I was treated by Dr Jelena and every person that I encountered at ARS Medica were friendly, helpful, professional, kind and may I say it again - professional!!! From the technicians, the nurses, every single one - absolutely fantastic.
I cannot stop smiling.
It is now almost a week after I have returned and I have no problems whatsoever.
Every question gets answered while you are there and even afterwards.
The cost is one reason why I went there and I will gladly fly to Montenegro again for any treatment that I might need.  If you consider dental work done overseas, do it with ARS Medica!!

I had a complicated dental procedure at Ars Medica Dental Clinic, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. The level of care and expertise was outstanding, making a potentially stressful situation smooth and painless. The cost was significantly lower compared to what I would pay abroad, and the savings were absolutely huge. Not only did I receive top-quality treatment, but I also left feeling truly cared for and delighted with the results. Highly recommend this clinic for anyone seeking affordable, exceptional dental care!

Niets dan lof over deze tandheelkundige kliniek. Het is de reis vanuit Nederland meer dan waard. De begeleiding van Dr Filip was heel prettig. Geen vraag is te gek, geen uitleg teveel. De korte lijntjes, het geduld, de transparantie over de kosten en alles in een tempo wat ik zelf prettig vond. Alles gebeurt in goed overleg en ik ben heel tevreden met het resultaat. De menselijke benadering maakt het gewoon heel prettig. En Podgorica is ook een hele leuke stad om te zijn. Dus tussen de behandelingen door is er ook tijd om te genieten van de stad en de omgeving. Dank je wel tandheelkundig team van Ars medica

I had an excellent experience at Ars Medica clinic in Montenegro. Dr. Jelena was amazing—professional, caring, and thorough. The treatment exceeded my expectations, and the staff made me feel comfortable throughout. Highly recommend!

Getting treated at Ars Medica has been an exceptional experience. I have had numerous of treatments at other clinics where you would not get the service you'd expect. At Ars Medica, the staff really takes time to explain you the whole process, gives you multiple options and actually treats you as a person rather than a number. Something I liked as well is that everything is well organized and the results are great!
Great team of experts who take their time for you. The clinic looks very good as well. I didn't have such a good experience at a dental clinic in a long time.

In June 2024, I had a total dental renovation carried out by Ars Medica. The choice to have this done at Ars Medica came from the pleasant communication and guidance. They had a good answer to every question. You know where you stand, what you can expert and what must be done.
I am extremely satisfied with the end result. In addition, the treatment and guidance at Ars Medica was more than excellent. An important advantage is that this clinic has everything in its own hands. The treatment, making prostheses any anesthesia (if needed). In my opinion, this also gives the best end result and a lot of flexibility. The guidance of Dr. Filip Sukovic and all the other doctors and guidance was extremely friendly and helped me a lot during my stay in Montenegro.
Of course, such treatment is not nothing, but the treatment at this Clinic with their expertise has helped me enormously.
I can recommend everyone to have such dental treatments performed by Ars Medica.
